case_title: WESTERN PLATE & WINDOW GLASS CO VS BAY AREA EPOXY INJECTION CO-D C ADAMS & SONS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESTERN PLATE & WINDOW GLASS CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA EPOXY INJECTION CO-D C ADAMS & SONS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,039.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WESTERN PLATE & WINDOW GLASS CO AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA EPOXY INJECTION CO-D C ADAMS & SONS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA EPOXY INJECTION CO-D C ADAMS & SONS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA EPOXY INJECTION CO-D C ADAMS & SONS
